parsed.answer: Broomsticks can be used for: (1) sweeping and cleaning floors, patios, and outdoor areas — their primary purpose; (2) reaching or knocking down objects in high places using the handle; (3) Halloween costumes and theatrical props; (4) improvised walking stick or balance aid; (5) garden and yard cleanup; (6) recreational sports like broomball or real-life quidditch; (7) fictional/cultural symbolism — witches riding them, Harry Potter Quidditch.
